title: Giffgaff使用指南
subTitle: 本教程为旅游专用，请遵守当地法律法规，禁止用于违法犯罪行为，否则后果自负
bottomText: ❤️ 有任何问题请联系QQ或TG客服，不要在闲鱼问，谢谢！❤️
allHead: <script src='https://blog.meekdai.com/Gmeek/plugins/GmeekVercount.js'></script><style>@media (prefers-color-scheme:light){html[data-color-mode='auto'],html[data-color-mode='auto'] body{background-color:#EEF3F7!important}}html[data-color-mode='light'],html[data-color-mode='light'] body{background-color:#EEF3F7!important}.Header{display:flex!important;align-items:center!important}.Header h1{transform:translateY(-8px)!important}.Header img{margin-top:0!important}#weatherEffect{position:fixed;left:0;top:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9999}</style><canvas id='weatherEffect'></canvas><script>(function(){const c=document.getElementById('weatherEffect');if(!c)return;if(window.matchMedia('(max-width:600px), (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce)').matches){c.remove();return}const ctx=c.getContext('2d');let w,h;let p=[];const m=new Date().getMonth()+1;const winter=m===12||m<=2;const summer=m>=6&&m<=8;function resize(){w=c.width=window.innerWidth;h=c.height=window.innerHeight}resize();window.addEventListener('resize',resize);let mobile=window.innerWidth<600;let count=mobile?50:120;for(let i=0;i<count;i++){p.push({x:Math.random()*w,y:Math.random()*h,l:Math.random()*18+10,s:Math.random()*1.2+.5,r:Math.random()*2.5+1})}function draw(){ctx.clearRect(0,0,w,h);if(winter){ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.85)';ctx.beginPath();p.forEach(a=>{ctx.moveTo(a.x,a.y);ctx.arc(a.x,a.y,a.r,0,Math.PI*2);a.y+=a.s;a.x+=Math.sin(a.y/70)*.35;if(a.y>h){a.y=-10;a.x=Math.random()*w}});ctx.fill()}else{ctx.strokeStyle=summer?'rgba(120,170,210,.50)':'rgba(120,150,180,.50)';ctx.lineWidth=1.4;p.forEach(a=>{ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(a.x,a.y);ctx.lineTo(a.x+2,a.y+a.l);ctx.stroke();a.y+=a.s*(mobile?(summer?7:5):(summer?4:2.5));a.x+=.25;if(a.y>h){a.y=-20;a.x=Math.random()*w}})}requestAnimationFrame(draw)}draw()})();</script><style>html,body{max-width:100%}#header,#content,.title-left,.d-flex{min-width:0}.title-right{flex-shrink:0}.SideNav{min-width:0!important;width:100%!important}.SideNav-item{min-width:0}.SideNav-item>.d-flex{flex:1 1 auto;min-width:0}.listLabels{flex:0 0 auto}#postBody{line-height:1.75!important;overflow-wrap:anywhere}#postBody p{margin:0 0 1em}#postBody img{max-width:100%;height:auto}#postBody table{display:block;max-width:100%;overflow-x:auto;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch}#postBody pre{max-width:100%;overflow-x:auto}#postBody a{overflow-wrap:anywhere}@media (max-width:600px){body{width:100%!important;max-width:100%!important;margin:0 auto!important;padding:12px!important;line-height:1.6!important}#header{align-items:center!important;gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px!important}.title-left{display:flex;align-items:center;flex:1 1 auto;overflow:hidden}.avatar{width:38px!important;height:38px!important;flex:0 0 38px}.blogTitle{display:block!important;min-width:0;max-width:none!important;margin-left:8px!important;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;font-size:18px!important;line-height:1.2!important}.title-right{gap:2px}.title-right .circle,.title-right button{box-sizing:border-box!important;display:flex!important;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:42px!important;height:42px!important;min-width:42px!important;margin-right:0!important;padding:0!important}#buttonRSS{display:none!important}.postTitle{flex:1 1 auto;min-width:0;margin:0!important;overflow-wrap:anywhere;font-size:26px!important;line-height:1.25!important}.SideNav-item{gap:8px;padding:12px 10px!important}.SideNav-icon{flex:0 0 16px;margin-right:8px!important}.listTitle{font-size:15px;line-height:1.4}.listLabels{margin-left:6px}.LabelName{max-width:72px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}#postBody{font-size:16px!important;line-height:1.75!important}#postBody h2{margin-top:1.6em;font-size:22px}#postBody h3{margin-top:1.4em;font-size:18px}#postBody table{font-size:14px}#cmButton{min-height:48px}#footer{margin-top:40px!important;padding-bottom:12px}#weatherEffect{display:none!important}}@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){#weatherEffect{display:none!important}.avatar{transition:none!important}.avatar:hover{transform:none!important}}</style>
